plan_metadata.name: Chat with your data customize Azure openAI ts Happy path
plan_metadata.description: Chat with your data customize Azure openAI ts Happy path

steps.description: Click on the "Teams Agents and Apps" option in the "New Project" dropdown menu within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "General Teams Agent" dropdown option within the "Teams Agent or App Using Teams AI Library" selection popup in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Customize" option in the "Select an option to load your data" dropdown within the "Teams Agent with Data" window in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "TypeScript" option in the "Programming Language" dropdown within the Microsoft Visual Studio Code interface.
Click the "Default folder" option in the "Workspace Folder" selection dropdown at the top of the Visual Studio Code window to set the project root directory to /home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects.
